markets.marketGuide: Which team will win the match. Overtime not included.
markets.title: 1,X,2
markets.name: 1X2

markets.marketGuide:
1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.
markets.name: 1X2 - Never Down

markets.marketGuide: Predict whether the total number of goals scored in regular time is over/under a given line. Half line (0.5; 1.5; 2.5 etc.) can be settled as won or lost. The whole line (1; 2; 3 etc.) can be settled as won, lost or void. For further information please refer to the “How to Play” section.

markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.

markets.name: Over/Under - Early Goals

markets.name: 1X2

markets.marketGuide:
1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.
markets.name: 1X2 - Never Down

markets.marketGuide: Predict whether the total number of goals scored in regular time is over/under a given line. Half line (0.5; 1.5; 2.5 etc.) can be settled as won or lost. The whole line (1; 2; 3 etc.) can be settled as won, lost or void. For further information please refer to the “How to Play” section.

markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.
markets.title: Goals,Over,Under
markets.name: Over/Under - Early Goals

markets.marketGuide: Which team will win the match. Overtime not included.
markets.title: 1,X,2
markets.name: 1X2

markets.marketGuide:
1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.
markets.name: 1X2 - Never Down

markets.marketGuide: Predict whether the total number of goals scored in regular time is over/under a given line. Half line (0.5; 1.5; 2.5 etc.) can be settled as won or lost. The whole line (1; 2; 3 etc.) can be settled as won, lost or void. For further information please refer to the “How to Play” section.

markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.

markets.name: Over/Under - Early Goals

1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.
markets.name: 1X2 - Never Down

markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.

markets.marketGuide: Which team will win the match. Overtime not included.
markets.title: 1,X,2
markets.name: 1X2

markets.marketGuide:
1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.
markets.name: 1X2 - Never Down

markets.marketGuide: Predict whether the total number of goals scored in regular time is over/under a given line. Half line (0.5; 1.5; 2.5 etc.) can be settled as won or lost. The whole line (1; 2; 3 etc.) can be settled as won, lost or void. For further information please refer to the “How to Play” section.

markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.

markets.marketGuide: Which team will win the match. Overtime not included.
markets.title: 1,X,2
markets.name: 1X2

markets.marketGuide:
1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.
markets.name: 1X2 - Never Down

markets.marketGuide: Predict whether the total number of goals scored in regular time is over/under a given line. Half line (0.5; 1.5; 2.5 etc.) can be settled as won or lost. The whole line (1; 2; 3 etc.) can be settled as won, lost or void. For further information please refer to the “How to Play” section.

markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.

markets.marketGuide: Which team will win the match. Overtime not included.
markets.title: 1,X,2
markets.name: 1X2

markets.marketGuide:
1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.
markets.name: 1X2 - Never Down

markets.marketGuide: Predict whether the total number of goals scored in regular time is over/under a given line. Half line (0.5; 1.5; 2.5 etc.) can be settled as won or lost. The whole line (1; 2; 3 etc.) can be settled as won, lost or void. For further information please refer to the “How to Play” section.

markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.

markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.

markets.marketGuide:
1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.

If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.

markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.

markets.marketGuide:
1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.

markets.marketGuide: Which team will win the match. Overtime not included.
markets.title: 1,X,2
markets.name: 1X2

markets.marketGuide:
1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.
markets.name: 1X2 - Never Down

markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.

markets.marketGuide: Which team will win the match. Overtime not included.
markets.title: 1,X,2
markets.name: 1X2

markets.marketGuide:
1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.
markets.name: 1X2 - Never Down

markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.
markets.title: Goals,Over,Under
markets.name: Over/Under - Early Goals

markets.marketGuide: Which team will win the match. Overtime not included.
markets.title: 1,X,2
markets.name: 1X2

markets.marketGuide:
1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.
markets.name: 1X2 - Never Down

The whole line (1; 2; 3 etc.) can be settled as won, lost or void. For further information please refer to the “How to Play” section.
markets.title: Goals,Over,Under
markets.name: Over/Under

markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.
markets.title: Goals,Over,Under
markets.name: Over/Under - Early Goals

markets.marketGuide: Which team will win the match. Overtime not included.
markets.title: 1,X,2
markets.name: 1X2

markets.marketGuide:
1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.
markets.name: 1X2 - Never Down

markets.name: 1X2

markets.marketGuide:
1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.

markets.marketGuide:

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.

markets.marketGuide: Which team will win the match. Overtime not included.
markets.title: 1,X,2
markets.name: 1X2

markets.marketGuide:
1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.
markets.name: 1X2 - Never Down

markets.marketGuide: Predict whether the total number of goals scored in regular time is over/under a given line. Half line (0.5; 1.5; 2.5 etc.) can be settled as won or lost. markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.

markets.name: Over/Under - Early Goals

markets.marketGuide: Which team will win the match. Overtime not included.
markets.title: 1,X,2
markets.name: 1X2

markets.marketGuide:
1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.
markets.name: 1X2 - Never Down

markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.

markets.marketGuide: Which team will win the match. Overtime not included.
markets.title: 1,X,2
markets.name: 1X2

markets.marketGuide:
1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.
markets.name: 1X2 - Never Down

markets.marketGuide: Predict whether the total number of goals scored in regular time is over/under a given line. Half line (0.5; 1.5; 2.5 etc.) can be settled as won or lost. markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.

Whole line (1; 2; 3 etc.) can be settled as won, lost or void. For further information please refer to the “How to Play” section.

markets.marketGuide: Which team will win the match. Overtime not included.
markets.title: 1,X,2
markets.name: 1X2

markets.marketGuide:
1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.
markets.name: 1X2 - Never Down

markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.

Whole line (1; 2; 3 etc.) can be settled as won, lost or void. For further information please refer to the “How to Play” section.
markets.name: 1st Half - Over/Under

markets.name: 1st Half - Over/Under

markets.marketGuide: Which team will win the match. Overtime not included.
markets.title: 1,X,2
markets.name: 1X2

markets.marketGuide:
1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.
markets.name: 1X2 - Never Down

markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.

Betting on the draw in this market is the same as in regular 1X2, it is resulted on the full-time score regardless of how and when any goals are scored (which is why the odds are the same).
markets.name: 1X2 - 1UP

markets.marketGuide:
2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.
markets.name: 1X2 - Never Down

markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.
markets.title: Goals,Over,Under
markets.name: Over/Under - Early Goals

2UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a two-goal lead, e.g. 2-0, 0-2, 3-1, 1-3. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw!

If a match is abandoned and a team has gone two or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners.

SportyBet reserves the right to void bets/selections if we identify any suspected illegal activity, bonus abuse, or violations of our terms and conditions.
markets.name: 1X2 - 2UP

markets.marketGuide: Never Down will reward you if your team wins the match without ever trailing. If your team goes one or more goals behind at any point, the selection loses, even if they later come back to win. If a match is abandoned after a team goes behind, bets on that selection will be settled as lost. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections in cases of identified integrity issues or abusive behaviour.
markets.name: 1X2 - Never Down

markets.marketGuide:
If a number of goals has been scored by a specified minute, your Over selection is settled as winning.
• Over 1.5 - if 1 goal is scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59)
• Over 2.5 - if 2 goals are scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59)
• Over 3.5 - if 3 goals are scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)

Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the Early Goals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.
